# Success

## Definition of done

The project is complete when:

- `rl_gbif_resolve()`, `rl_occurrences()`, and `rl_check_occurrences()`
  are available in a version of `redlist` accepted on CRAN,
- two vignettes are published on the [documentation site](https://stangandaho.github.io/redlist/index.html)

## Measuring success

During development, progress is tracked by milestone completion against
the dates in the project plan.

After release, the main indicator is CRAN download counts tracked via
the `cranlogs` package.

## Future work

- Continue to maintain the package.
- Intergrate calculation of the population metrics related to the IUCN criteria A, C, and D
